title: UI Design Landing Page
description: In our basic exploration UI/UX design course, you'll learn the fundamentals of UI and UX design, including how to create wireframes, design prototypes, and conduct user research.

title: Html and JavaScript
description: You'll learn how to create web pages from scratch, style them with CSS, and add interactivity with JavaScript.

title: Basic Flat Illustration
description: With expert guidance and practical tips, you'll gain the skills you need to create stunning flat illustrations that stand out from the crowd.
